scripts.sync-web: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path internal/api/dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force internal/api/dist }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force internal/api/dist | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse web/dist/* internal/api/dist/"
scripts.build: npm run web:build && npm run sync-web && go build -o bin/monitor.exe ./cmd/monitor
scripts.test: npm run test:go && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
